name: Brand Messaging Matrix
description: Brand Messaging Matrix - Marketing template for brand professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template Step 1: Define Your Brand Foundation Start with the Brand Foundation tab. This is your strategic core — positioning statement, mission, vision, values, and brand personality. Everything else flows from here. If you cannot fill this in clearly, stop and workshop it before moving on. Step 2: Build Your Messaging Pillars Go to the Messaging Pillars tab. Define 3-5 core messages that support your positioning. Each pillar should have a headline, supporting narrative, proof points, and an emotional hook. These are the themes you will repeat across every channel. Step 3: Map
